hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty' | { read -r f; if [[ "$f" == *examples/*.md ]]; then node scripts/aio.mjs validate "$f"; fi; }
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty' | { read -r f; if [[ "$f" == *assets/ai-output-runtime.js || "$f" == *scripts/aio.mjs ]]; then node --check "$f"; fi; }
